name: Impossible Panorama
description: Search an enormous depth-layered scene, recognize one transient moving event, frame it in the reticle, tune its true focal plane, and sustain a stable shutter hold during the live event phase.
natural_language: Find the survey moth whose twin vanes lock tip-to-tip inside two expanding rings. Frame it, focus it, and hold the shutter through the event.

metadata.notes: Procedural 4800x2400 panorama with 32 searchable sectors, real camera gestures, explicit zoom/focus controls, temporal target motion, depth feedback, a sustained eight-sample shutter hold, independent viewport replay, and challenge-bound terminal verification.
